data.name: Futa Succubus Slay!
data.detailed_description:
Futanari succubi are coming for your women!

Three well-endowed succubi have broken out of the underworld and are running havoc! Seduce every woman who crosses their path using spirelike card-combat! Collect powerful artifacts and build the perfect deck for the Seductress, Soul Collector and Dreamweaver — each with her own unique strategy and card options.

Each time you make a conquest you'll have the option to breed or corrupt your lover! But watch out, the next time you encounter her — on this run or the next — you may find her altered by the experience, creating greater challenges and unlocking new erotic scenes!
data.about_the_game:
Futanari succubi are coming for your women!

Three well-endowed succubi have broken out of the underworld and are running havoc! Seduce every woman who crosses their path using spirelike card-combat! Collect powerful artifacts and build the perfect deck for the Seductress, Soul Collector and Dreamweaver — each with her own unique strategy and card options.

Each time you make a conquest you'll have the option to breed or corrupt your lover! But watch out, the next time you encounter her — on this run or the next — you may find her altered by the experience, creating greater challenges and unlocking new erotic scenes!
data.short_description: Futanari succubi! Fuccubi? Succunari? It doesn't matter, they're here and they're horny! Engage in card battles to seduce your way up the tower of heaven itself. Leave your conquests forever altered in your wake! Enjoy the consequences of your actions in future runs!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 1Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS 3.0 / Ubuntu 20.04 (64-bit) or equivalent
  • 處理器: 1Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
